testsuite.name: ExampleEntityController Tests

testcase.name: Should delete entity by business ID successfully
Should return OK with null when entity has no change metadata
Should return not found when entity does not exist
Should return not found when business ID does not exist
Should delete entity by ID successfully
Should search entities by category (low volume in-memory)
Should get entity by business ID successfully
Should get entity by ID with point in time
Should update entity with workflow transition
Should create entity successfully when no duplicate exists
Should search with pagination (high volume pageable)
Should return conflict when duplicate business ID exists
Should return not found when deleting non-existent business ID
Should get entity by technical ID successfully
Should return bad request when create fails
